title: Baermann Funnel Extraction
steps: Weigh out 50 g, soil in a weigh boat
Place tissue paper on top of Baermann funnel apparatus
Place weighed and sieved soil on top of filter paper
Fill Baermann funnel with DI water using a DI water bottle so that soil sample is saturated but not submerged in water
Cover all Baermann funnels with a plastic Uline
At 24:00:00 and 48:00:00 mark, check soil and refill any funnels with decreased water levels to prevent the soil from drying out.
At 72:00:00 empty funnel over a 25um mesh sieve to collect nematodes
Transfer the nematodes that are on the sieve into a labelled centrifuge tube using a hot fixative Fixative preparation for Baermann funnel extraction by Casey A Schlenker
Count the entire sample at 50x magnification using a dissecting scope
Collect soil from top of Baermann funnel; dry and weigh to get gravimetric soil moisture content
creator: Casey A Schlenker
